description.value: Cost: 1 Effect: Running start (10+ feet): Jump up to 3 + (Strength ÷ 2, rounded down) feet. Standing jump: Jump up to half that distance. An [[/check skill=athletics]] may be required for difficult jumps (GM discretion), Landing in difficult terrain may require [[/check skill=acrobatics]] to avoid falling prone

system.effect: Running start (10+ feet): Jump up to 3 + (Strength ÷ 2, rounded down) feet. Standing jump: Jump up to half that distance. An Athletics check may be required for difficult jumps (GM discretion), Landing in difficult terrain may require Acrobatics check to avoid falling prone
